title: TC001-post auth send otp with valid and invalid phone
description: Test the POST /auth/send-otp endpoint with valid phone numbers to receive OTP sent confirmation and with invalid phone formats to receive a 400 error.
testError: Test execution failed or timed out

title: TC002-post auth verify otp with correct and incorrect otp
description: Test the POST /auth/verify-otp endpoint with correct OTP to receive a JWT access token and with incorrect OTP to receive a 401 invalid OTP error.
testError: Test execution failed or timed out

title: TC003-post shops with and without authorization
description: Test the POST /shops endpoint with valid shop owner JWT to create a shop and without authorization header to receive a 401 unauthorized error.
testError: Test execution failed or timed out

title: TC004-get shops by id with existing and nonexisting shop
description: Test the GET /shops/:id endpoint with an existing shop ID to receive shop details and with a nonexistent shop ID to receive a 404 not found error.
testError: Test execution failed or timed out

title: TC005-get shops dashboard with valid and invalid roles
description: Test the GET /shops/dashboard endpoint with a valid shop owner JWT to receive dashboard metrics and with a JWT of a non-owner role to receive a 403 forbidden error.
testError: Test execution failed or timed out

title: TC006-post products with valid data and missing fields
description: Test the POST /products endpoint with valid product data and shop owner JWT to add a product and with missing required fields to receive a 400 validation error.
testError: Test execution failed or timed out

title: TC007-get search shops with location and fallback scenarios
description: Test the GET /search/shops endpoint with valid query and location parameters to receive a list of shops, without location parameters to receive a 400 error, and with backend errors to receive a 500 error or fallback cached results.
testError: Test execution failed or timed out

title: TC008-post chat conversations and quotes with role based access
description: Test the POST /chat/conversations endpoint with valid customer JWT to create a conversation, POST /chat/quotes with shop owner JWT to create a quote, and verify that customers cannot create quotes (403 forbidden).
testError: Test execution failed or timed out

title: TC009-post chat quotes accept with valid and invalid quote ids
description: Test the POST /chat/quotes/:quoteId/accept endpoint with valid quote ID and customer JWT to create an order and with nonexistent quote ID to receive a 404 not found error.
testError: Test execution failed or timed out

title: TC010-get orders and complete order with authorization checks
description: Test the GET /orders/:orderId endpoint with authorized user JWT to retrieve order details and with unauthorized JWT to receive 403 forbidden, and test POST /orders/:orderId/complete with proper authorization and dev flag to complete order and without to receive 403 forbidden.
testError: Test execution failed or timed out
